task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and correct. Successfully adds the new static function common_chat_params_init_mistral_instruct_v3 with proper signature and implementation. Auto-detection logic correctly checks for [INST] presence and [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence, distinguishing from other Mistral variants. Includes LOG_DBG call, uses COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY format, sets </s> as additional_stops, and dispatches from template detection function correctly. No existing handlers modified. Minor consideration: the actual [INST]/[/INST] wrapping and system message prepending are delegated to common_chat_template_direct_apply_impl and the template itself rather than explicit in this handler, but this appears to be the intended design pattern for specialized template handlers in this codebase and is acceptable.
